We need to summarize in exactly 2 sentences, capturing main point and any action items. The email: Legal approved updated terms with 2 changes: add arbitration clause for enterprise tier, revise data retention to 90 days from 180. These changes need to go live before EU launch on May 1. I'll prepare the final version today. - Legal

So main point: Legal approved changes, need to go live before May 1 EU launch. Action items: prepare final version today (by sender). Could also note that changes need to be implemented before launch. So two sentences.

Sentence 1: Legal has approved the updated terms, adding an arbitration clause for the enterprise tier and reducing data retention from 180 to 90 days. Sentence 2: The changes must be implemented before the EU launch on May 1, and the sender will prepare the final version today.

That's exactly 2 sentences. Ensure no extra sentences. Provide
